title: Crashes with GCC 15
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.52+139 (git sha1 f60bbe64a, g++ 15.1.1 -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -fno-plt -fexceptions -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -ffile-prefix-map=/build/yosys-git/src=/usr/src/debug/yosys-git -flto=auto -fPIC -O3 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

When building the [`yosys-git` AUR package](https://aur.archlinux.org/packages/yosys-git), the testsuite has recently started failing. It seems to be at least incidentally connected to the update to GCC 15.

I've got a crash narrowed down to this:

```
$ echo 'module top(); endmodule' > test.v
$ ./yosys --trace -p 'read_verilog test.v; hierarchy -top top; proc; design -save foo'
[...see below...]
corrupted size vs. prev_size in fastbins
fish: Job 1, './yosys --trace -p 'read_verilo…' terminated by signal SIGABRT (Abort)
```

### Expected Behavior

Yosys does not crash and completes the testsuite successfully.

### Actual Behavior
